title.en: After Zhou Tian left, Ye Tian continued to prac...

content.en:
After Zhou Tian left, Ye Tian continued to practice in retreat.

In a short period of time, he and Zhou Tian will not go to the Temu Ruins, so he will not waste this time and strive to improve his strength a little more.

And now, the aspect where Ye Tian can improve his strength is the Hell Divine Sky Spear, once he comprehends the Hell Divine Sky Spear, a spatial divine power, to the Xiaocheng realm, it will be of great help to his strength increase.

As for the Wheel of Time, although he could also be promoted to the Xiaocheng realm, since the Wheel of Time had not been cultivated for a long time, it was easier for him to cultivate the Hell Divine Sky Spear to the Xiaocheng realm.

Of course, Ye Tian would also try his best to perfect other secret techniques and the Heavenly Moon Knife Peerless Technique.

Time passes slowly!

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's expression was overjoyed, and he looked at the spear that appeared in his hand, which was the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky.

At this time, the Hell Divine Sky Spear was filled with terrifying spatial rules, and its momentum was far greater than before.

"The Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, it's small!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

This space is a big magic power, which represents a further step in Ye Tian's strength.

Moreover, in the past hundred years, he has also taken a step closer to comprehending the Sword Dao Peerless Sect, allowing the Tianyue Sword Peerless Sect to enter the lower middle level of the supreme Sword Dao Peerless Sect.

In the past, although the Tianyue Sword Peerless Sect was a supreme-level sword path peerless skill, it was only limited to the inferior supreme sword path mastery.

Now it has been promoted from the lower class to the lower middle, which is a lot of progress!

In terms of other secret techniques, Ye Tian's progress was also very great, and the Immortal Soul Realm had also been raised to the middle limit of the Immortal General.

In addition, Ye Tian also used a large amount of strange water quality energy to refine his body to the limit, and the fit between his body and the Chaos Avenue also reached an incredible level.

Moreover, Ye Tian also raised the Chaos Dao of the Law Realm a little, making the Chaos Sea Law stronger than before!

"It's almost time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After waiting for a hundred years, Zhou Tian has already fully recovered, and he has begun to take on some tasks these days, even if he goes to the Temu ruins, he will not attract the attention of others.

Immediately, Ye Tian informed Zhou Tian to come to Tiange.

It didn't take long for Sunday to come!

"Master, are we leaving?"

Zhou Tian asked.

"Well, after waiting for a hundred years, it's time to go to the ruins of the Tiemu Clan!" Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

Zhou Tian was also very excited, after all, the Ancient Tree of Life was an eternal lifespan for him, he was not as rebellious as Ye Tian, if he wanted to accumulate a deeper foundation, he would have to consume a long time, and before he became a cosmic god, his lifespan was limited.

And the treasure that can increase the life span is too rare, if he can get the Life Ancient Tree, then everything is not a problem, he can stay at the Great God level for a long time, just to accumulate the foundation.

Therefore, he really wanted to go to the Temu ruins as soon as possible to seize the Ancient Tree of Life.

Of course, he also knew that he couldn't rush it, so he held back!

"Master, do we want to take a mission to the Temu ruins, so that we can do it along the way!" Zhou Tian proposed.

"No!" Ye Tian refused, "Although there are many tasks at the Temu Ruins, there is basically no benefit, if you take it, it may be excusable, and it is very suspicious for me to take this task." Let's go straight over, hang around a few star fields first, and then rush to the Temu Ruins, so that no one can track us down!"

"Okay, listen to the master!"

Zhou Tian responded.

Subsequently.

Zhou Tian took Ye Tian's spaceship and set off from Tianlan Big City.

In this operation, Zhou Tian did not inform his escorts, but set off alone.

Although the Guardians are loyal, when facing the Ancient Tree of Life, the so-called loyalty may be gone.

Therefore, Zhou Tian only said to the escort team to go to Tianlan Giant City for a walk, and did not let the escort team follow.

Moreover, with Ye Tian's strength, even if the master was following him now, he would be able to find out in an instant.

After confirming that no one was following, Ye Tian drove the spaceship through the Sanctuary with all his strength and headed to other star fields.

A few days later.

Ye Tian spared a few star fields, and then went to the site of the Temu clan.

......

The Ironwood were destroyed by the Terrans, but many of the buildings were not.

The wealth of the Temu clan is still a lot, after all, it is a race, except for the core area that has been collected by the nine supreme forces of the human race and the supreme hall of the human race, there are also many treasures in other places.

Therefore, many people of the Terran came to the Temu to collect resources and treasures, resulting in a lot of people coming to the Temu.

Among them, most of them are at the Great God level, galaxy level, and galaxy level, but the human beings in the realm above the cosmic god are very rare.

"The Ironwood region has arrived!"

Ye Tian said to Zhou Tian.

"Zhou Tian, let's go directly to the entrance of that inheritance space!"

Ye Tiandao.

Zhou Tian told him the specific location, so Ye Tian directly let the spaceship shuttle over.

"Hmm!"

Zhou Tian nodded.

Swish!

The spaceship shuttled to the outside of the Ironwood Continent before stopping.

The Ironwood Continent is the headquarters continent of the Ironwood Clan, this continent is very large, and the richest resource in this continent is a tree called the Nine Sections of Ironwood.

This tree is harder than blacksteel, has good toughness, and has some resilience, making it ideal for construction.

On the Ironwood Continent, ironwood buildings occupy the majority, and the Ironwood clan is also proud of owning the nine-stage ironwood resources.

"Zhou Tian, let's go down, the spaceship is too conspicuous to enter the Ironwood Continent!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Well, it's not far from the entrance anyway, Master, let's fly over!"

Zhou Tiandao.

Wow!

Ye Tian waved his hand, collected the spaceship, and then flew towards the entrance of the inheritance space with Zhou Tian.

Soon.

They came to the top of an ancient mountain with a very old temple on it.

The temple is not a woodwork building, but an ordinary stone building, and it can be seen from the dilapidation of the temple inside, which has been abandoned for a long time.

"Master, this was originally a temple, but it was abandoned. The Ironwood Clan didn't expect that this would be one of the entrances to the inheritance space. The last time I hung out here, I occasionally triggered the inheritance mechanism, and I was lucky enough to enter the inheritance space!" Zhou Tian explained.

Immediately, the two entered the temple.

In the middle of the temple, there is a statue of a god of unknown material.

"Master, this statue has a small magic circle inside, and if you touch the magic circle, it will trigger the detection device. If you pass the test, you will be able to enter the inheritance space. "

After Zhou Tian finished speaking, he used his immortal power to trigger the magic circle inside the statue.

At this time, a ray of light seeped out and shone on Ye Tian and Zhou Tian's bodies.

In fact, Ye Tian could see at a glance that this was a formation to test people's potential, and if it was suitable, it would trigger a deeper formation.

Of course!

This is also the strength of Ye Tian's immortal soul, so he can find it so easily, otherwise it will not be easy to find even if the master comes here, which is why the Tiemu clan has not discovered this place.

After all, this is an extremely ancient temple, and the Temu clan actually occupied this continent later, this temple was built in ancient times, and the Temu clan did not know the origin of this temple at all.

Rumble!!!!

Space Circle is coming!

In an instant, Ye Tian and Zhou Tian were attracted to the past.

Ye Tian was able to resist, but he didn't resist, otherwise it would be difficult for him to enter the inheritance space with his strength.

Rushing!!!

After the transformation of the void, Ye Tian found himself in a world with Zhou Tian standing next to him.

"Master, we're in!"

Zhou Tiandao.
